title: [BUG] Wrong type of property "dimensions" in interface "Row"
author: kholekh
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Wrong type of property "dimensions" in interface "Row"

Lib version: 4.4.0
Typescript

const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
const ws = wb.addWorksheet('XYZ');

const { min } = ws.addRow([1,2,3]).dimesions; //Error: Property 'min' does not exist on type 'number'.
